section: ARECO Schedule A: Assets and Unearned Income
layout_note: Typed attachment table, transposed spreadsheet layout: one asset per column, attribute labels down the left. Selections are black-filled cells. Three asset columns (all EIF). The Transaction row is a continuous black band across all three columns (no letter visible); the two XLF columns carry real value buckets (G and D) despite the black Transaction band, confirming it is a divider rather than a marked transaction.
